_about: Catalogue of pets with DUNGEON-COMBAT special behaviour (research §13). Compiled from itrtg.wiki.gg. Each entry records the in-combat special, its formula/conditions, the engine AbilityFlag(s) it maps to (see packages/core/src/domain/pet.ts), and whether the simulator currently models it (`simModeled`). Out-of-combat-only pets (campaign/crafting/drop-rate/growth) are deliberately excluded — see docs/itrtg-pet-dungeons-research.md §13 for the full survey.

pets.combatSpecial: Cannot attack or deal damage. At the start of each round it Scares a random enemy, halving its Attack and Defense (30% reduction for bosses); lowered DEF also raises the chance that enemy is targeted. Acts first via +9999 speed initiative. CL20 'Twin Scare' applies the debuff twice.
pets.formula: scareSuccess = Ghost_ATK / enemy_DEF * 0.6 ; reduction = 50% (30% boss)
pets.conditions: Cannot equip knives; uses Inferno/Ego sword for ATK to feed Scare.

pets.combatSpecial: Takes only ONE action per turn regardless of speed, always attacks LAST, and all its damage is tripled (×3). +30% to its own Attack, -10% HP/DEF/SPD. Exempt from the back-row damage penalty. +25% extra vs Flying-Eyeball-marked targets.
pets.formula: damage ×3 ; actions = 1 ; +30% ATK stat
pets.conditions: The class-conditional aura (+2%/CL single-target) only applies if YOUR class is Assassin — separate from this innate package.

pets.combatSpecial: Chance to fire an extra arrow (one extra attack) when a Bow is equipped.
pets.formula: extraAttackChance = (20 + 1.25 * CL)% , capped 100% (CL64)

pets.combatSpecial: Mage: gains extra attack hits that scale with Wind element level.
pets.formula: extraHits = floor(Wind / 450), capped at 7 (3150 Wind); +50% with equipped Wind
pets.conditions: Best as Mage; scales with Wind gear.

pets.combatSpecial: Deals passive AoE damage to all non-boss enemies every turn, ignoring defense and dodge. Scales with Water element and evolution form.
pets.formula: V3-: (1 + Water/500)% ; V4: (3 + Water/400)% ; V5: (5 + Water/300)% ; cap 10% of enemy max HP

pets.combatSpecial: Defender: counterattacks for 10% of its own max HP when attacked directly or when protecting a pet. 65% protect chance (vs 60%). HP ×3 in dungeons.
pets.formula: counterDamage = MaxHP * 0.1

pets.combatSpecial: Any enemy that attacks Elephant is burned for a share of its own max HP per action for 5 actions.
pets.formula: burn = 3% of attacker max HP/action (1.5% for bosses), 5 actions

pets.combatSpecial: Supporter: first action each turn slows ALL enemies' Speed. Lasts 2 turns, stacks, halved in boss rooms. When evolved Supporter, grants a party +1%/CL speed aura instead of the standard damage-reduction aura.
pets.formula: enemySpeedReduction = (10 + 0.2 * CL)% per turn

pets.combatSpecial: Has its own damage multiplier (replaces any blacksmith weapon boost). Immune to stun; when it would be stunned, instead rages for +20% damage until end of turn.
pets.formula: damageMult = 1 + 0.01 * CL ; rage = +20% on would-be-stun

pets.combatSpecial: Single-target attacks self-heal a share of her max HP (lifesteal).
pets.formula: heal = (CL / 3)% of max HP per single-target attack (CL100 = 33.3%)

pets.combatSpecial: After each attack deals random 'true damage' that bypasses defense and multipliers.
Team-wide damage-reduction aura and healing of injured pets. Strongest single aura applies (does not stack).
pets.formula: damageReduction = min(50%, 1% * CL) from CL10 ; heal = 10 + ATK * (CL * 0.2)
pets._simNote: Modeled as a flat 50% team reduction (represents a CL50 supporter present); CL-scaling is a documented refinement.

pets.combatSpecial: First attack marks the lowest-max-HP enemy; all pets then focus it and deal bonus damage to it. Re-marks next-lowest on death.
pets.formula: markedBonus = (10 + CL/4)% , cap 35% (CL100) ; Sniper +25% vs marked
pets._simNote: Focus-fire targeting + mark not yet modeled (requires shared target state).

pets.combatSpecial: First action = AoE Poison Explosion to all enemies + element reduction; subsequent turns apply a DoT. Persists after death.
pets.formula: explosion = (150% + 1.5%*CL) + -10% enemy elements ; DoT = (50% + 0.5%*CL) + -0.8% element/turn
pets.conditions: Fails vs reflect enemies; exactly 6 dmg vs Cosmic Gnome.
pets._simNote: Multi-turn DoT + element-debuff persistence not yet modeled.

pets.combatSpecial: Assassin: each attack applies a stacking poison DoT resolved at end of round.
pets.formula: DoT = (0.003 * CL) * Arachne_ATK/round ; -70% boss ; -90% if Mage ; her hits ×0.7

pets.combatSpecial: Assassin: deals 15% of an enemy's max HP every 3 turns; buffs party Wind element.
pets.formula: nuke = 15% max HP every 3 turns ; +5*CL Wind to party
pets.conditions: Not in boss rooms; Assassin class only.

pets.combatSpecial: Supporter: AoE heal-all at the start of every turn, scaling with Fire element.
pets.formula: healAll scales with Fire, cap 15% of max HP at 1500 Fire ; +1.5%*CL Supporter power
pets._simNote: Team heal-over-time not yet modeled (no heal action in resolver).

pets.combatSpecial: Defender: once-per-room party shield scaling with Earth element; post-evolution party DEF boost.
pets.formula: shield: Earth / 3*Earth / 5*Earth*(0.5+0.02*CL) by upgrade ; defBoost = (Earth/300)% cap 20%
pets.conditions: Shield refreshes each room, not healable.
pets._simNote: Party shields not yet modeled (no shield pool in resolver).

pets.combatSpecial: Defender: bow attacks can charm/stun enemies; reduces party speed-damage taken.
pets.formula: charmStun = 0.5%*CL chance, 3 actions ; speedDmgReduction = 0.5%*CL
pets.conditions: Requires a bow, must not be Mage, not in boss rooms.

pets.combatSpecial: Mage aura: boosts the player's MULTI-TARGET dungeon damage (NOT an extra-attacks mechanic — that is Sylph).
pets.formula: +0.51% * CL to multi-target damage if your class is Mage
pets.conditions: Aura on the player God, not the pet's own attack.
pets._simNote: Player-God damage auras are out of the per-pet combat model.
